import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Search, Filter, ToggleLeft, ToggleRight, Trash2, Download } from 'lucide-react'; import { format } from 'date-fns'; const Students = () => { // Mock data for demonstration const [students, setStudents] = useState([ { id: 1, fullName: 'Rahul Kumar', email: 'rahul.kumar@college.edu', phoneNumber: '+91 9876543210', rollNumber: 'CS2021001', department: 'Computer Science', currentCgpa: 8.5, active: true, registrationDate: '2024-03-15' }, { id: 2, fullName: 'Priya Sharma', email: 'priya.sharma@college.edu', phoneNumber: '+91 9876543211', rollNumber: 'CS2021002', department: 'Computer Science', currentCgpa: 7.8, active: true, registrationDate: '2024-03-14' }, { id: 3, fullName: 'Amit Patel', email: 'amit.patel@college.edu', phoneNumber: '+91 9876543212', rollNumber: 'CS2021003', department: 'Computer Science', currentCgpa: 6.9, active: false, registrationDate: '2024-03-13' } ]); const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState(''); const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState('all'); const handleToggleStatus = (studentId) => { setStudents(students.map(student => student.id === studentId ? { ...student, active: !student.active } : student )); }; const filteredStudents = students.filter(student => { const matchesSearch = student.fullName.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) || student.email.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) || student.rollNumber?.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()); const matchesFilter = filterStatus === 'all' || (filterStatus === 'active' && student.active) || (filterStatus === 'inactive' && !student.active); return matchesSearch && matchesFilter; }); return (

); }; export default Students;
